findings.summary: Validation result totals are stale: the document still reports OK (152 tests) / OK (35 tests) instead of the reviewed branch's OK (153 tests) / OK (36 tests).

test_sufficiency_summary: Sufficient: tactical source-contract and live GUI coverage both target the content-based split/stack contract, and verifier reruns passed with OK (153 tests) and OK (36 tests).
documentation_accuracy_summary: Partially accurate: UsersGuide matches the shipped behavior, but DesignNotes records stale validation totals for the reviewed branch.
